sys_ws_operation.name: Fetch Integration Config Options

sys_update_version.name: sys_ws_operation_8866a57783b62210b474b755eeaad3f7
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl>cf9d01d3e73003009d6247e603f6a990</enforce_acl><http_method>GET</http_method><name>Fetch Integration Config Options</name><operation_script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {
    var result = {
        status: "success",
        incident_statuses: [],
		incident_urgencies: [],
		incident_mandatory_fields: []
    };

    try {
        // Fetch Incident States
        var stateGR = new GlideRecord('sys_choice');
        stateGR.addQuery('name', 'incident');
        stateGR.addQuery('element', 'state');
		stateGR.query();
        while (stateGR.next()) {
            result.incident_statuses.push({
                label: stateGR.label.toString(),
                value: stateGR.value.toString(),
                sys_id: stateGR.sys_id.toString()
            });
        }

		// Fetch Incident Urgency
        var urgencyGR = new GlideRecord('sys_choice');
        urgencyGR.addQuery('name', 'task');
        urgencyGR.addQuery('element', 'urgency');
		urgencyGR.query();
        while (urgencyGR.next()) {
            result.incident_urgencies.push({
                label: urgencyGR.label.toString(),
                value: urgencyGR.value.toString(),
                sys_id: urgencyGR.sys_id.toString()
            });
        }

		// Fetch All Incident Fields
        var addedFields = {};

		var tables = ['task', 'incident']; // 'task' first so child fields can override if needed
		for (var i = 0; i < tables.length; i++) {
			var dictGR = new GlideRecord('sys_dictionary');
			dictGR.addQuery('name', tables[i]);
			dictGR.addQuery('internal_type', '!=', 'collection'); // Skip form sections
			dictGR.query();

			while (dictGR.next()) {
				var fieldName = dictGR.element.toString();
				if (!addedFields[fieldName]) {
					result.incident_mandatory_fields.push({
						label: dictGR.getDisplayValue('column_label'),
						name: fieldName,
					});
					addedFields[fieldName] = true;
				}
			}
		}


        response.setStatus(200);
        return result;

    } catch (e) {
        response.setStatus(400); // Bad Request
        return {
            status: "error",
            message: e.message || "Unexpected error occurred while processing the request."
        };
    }

})(request, response);
]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/x_xurrent_imr/xurrent_imr_integrations/fetch_integration_config_options</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/fetch_integration_config_options</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-07-24 12:47:43</sys_created_on><sys_id>8866a57783b62210b474b755eeaad3f7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>6</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Fetch Integration Config Options</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Xurrent IMR" source="x_xurrent_imr">99b1a1ff83762210b474b755eeaad3d0</sys_package><sys_policy>protected</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Xurrent IMR">99b1a1ff83762210b474b755eeaad3d0</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_8866a57783b62210b474b755eeaad3f7</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-29 18:31:03</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Xurrent IMR Integrations">1046e93783b62210b474b755eeaad310</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>
